name: Clam & Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the clams and save the liquor.
2. Chop the clams.
3. Fry the bacon until crisp; drain on absorbent paper.
4. Cook the onion in butter until tender.
5. Add the saved liquor, potatoes, seasonings (celery salt and pepper), and clams to the pot. Cook for 15 to 20 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
6. Stir in the corn, milk, and remaining butter. Heat gently.
7. Sprinkle cracker crumbs over the top before serving.
